Amanda Collins

Candidate for Freelance Executive Assistant – Proactive & Senior-Level Support | Multi-Ventures (Remote)

Location United Kingdom (GMT/BST)Availability Immediate; 30-35 hours per month dedicated freelance capacity (Remote).Languages English (Native)
Professional Summary

Amanda is an exceptionally versatile Senior Executive Assistant with over 15 years of experience delivering high-level administrative, operational, and strategic support to C-suite leaders and entrepreneurs. Proven in managing complex environments, she previously oversaw up to 20 simultaneous executive diaries at Connells Group and now operates as a dedicated freelance support partner for founders. As a qualified ADHD coach, Amanda brings a unique, empathetic, and highly effective approach to keeping dynamic leaders organized, unblocking operational bottlenecks, and prioritizing business-critical tasks. She is fully established as a registered UK freelancer with guaranteed capacity of 30-35 hours per month to support multi-venture operations.

Key Highlights
  • Extensive experience juggling up to 20 complex executive diaries simultaneously, demonstrating master-level schedule integration across multiple business entities.
  • Proactively designed and standard-set structured meeting preparation frameworks—including pre-briefing packs, action trackers, and organized document repositories—dramatically reducing executive preparation time.
  • Implements a rigorous, color-coded email triage process (Red/Amber/Green) that filters administrative noise, drafts pre-approved responses, and prioritizes critical business communications.
  • Leverages specialized ADHD coaching background to intuitively adapt to dynamic, fast-moving entrepreneurs, providing confident gatekeeping while maintaining warm stakeholder relationships.
  • Hands-on expertise across both Microsoft Workspace and Google Ecosystems, as well as operational tools including Xero, HubSpot, MS Teams, Zoom, and Canva.
  • Fully registered and compliant UK freelancer featuring active UTR, ICO registration, and professional indemnity insurance with dedicated 30-35 monthly hours available.
